responses: Hello! I'm your GoLorry assistant. How can I help you move your load today?
Hi! Ready to book a truck?

patterns: I want to book a truck
I have 5 tons of goods to move
Need a truck from Delhi to Mumbai
responses: Sure! I can help with that. Please tell me your pickup and drop locations.
I'll help you book a truck. What is the weight of your cargo?
I'm fetching your tracking details. One moment...
You can view the live status in the 'Orders' tab. Would you like me to show it?
Our rates start at ₹500 for local trips. For long distance, it depends on the weight and distance.
I can give you an estimate. What is your destination?
I'm sorry to hear that. I've raised a priority ticket for you. An agent will call you in 10 mins.
Please describe your issue, and I will connect you with our support team.

patterns: I want to stop the order
responses: I can help cancel that. Please note that cancellation charges may apply if the driver is already on the way.
Are you sure you want to cancel your current booking?
